problem.title: Regular Expression Matching
problem.description: Given an input string s and a pattern p, implement regular expression matching with support for '.' and '*'.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – Dynamic Programming
solutions.description: Build a 2D DP table where dp[i][j] indicates whether s[0..i-1] matches p[0..j-1]. A '*' can mean zero occurrences (inherit dp[i][j-2]) or one-or-more occurrences if the preceding pattern character matches the current string character. The empty-pattern base cases handle patterns like 'a*b*' that can match an empty string.
